task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the EMR as the demo provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main screen is visible, and the logged-in user is indicated as 'demo_provider' or similar provider name.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the chart for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active patient chart displays the name 'Hobert Wuckert' and/or DOB 'October 27, 2000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's social history was accurately documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's social history section, there is text or selected options indicating: former smoker (quit 2015), social alcohol use (2-3 drinks/week), and no illicit drug use.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's family history was accurately documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's family history section, there are entries for Father (Type 2 Diabetes mellitus, deceased at age 72, cardiac event) and Mother (Hypertension, living).

task_completion.description: Verify the patient's primary insurance was accurately documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the patient's insurance or demographics section, Medicare is listed as the primary insurance with Member ID '1EG4-TE5-MK72' and Group Number 'A1234'.

task_completion.description: Verify an initial consultation encounter was created for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new encounter, visit, or note is visible in the patient's chart, labeled as an 'initial consultation' or similar new patient visit type.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not a terminal window executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text for history, insurance, and encounters should be entered into the appropriate form fields within the EMR web application, not just typed into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) should not be open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Hobert Wuckert (PID: 11, DOB: 2000-10-27, Male). Provider: demo_provider. Practice: Hillside Family Medicine. EMR System: NOSH ChartingSystem. Expected Social History: Former smoker (quit 2015), social alcohol (2-3 drinks/week), no illicit drugs. Expected Family History: Father (Type 2 Diabetes, deceased at 72 from cardiac event), Mother (Hypertension, living). Expected Insurance: Medicare (Member ID: 1EG4-TE5-MK72, Group: A1234). Expected Encounter: Initial consultation.
